overview.title: Connecting continents via air
descriptions: When time defines the outcome, air freight becomes more than speed, it becomes strategy.

DahNAY connects global markets through disciplined, time-sensitive air cargo solutions. From urgent consignments to high-value shipments, we ensure precision in movement, clarity in compliance and visibility at every milestone.
Across continents, across time zones, across critical deadlines, we move with control.

items.question: What air freight services does DahNAY provide?
items.answer: DahNAY offers comprehensive air freight services including express shipping, consolidated air cargo, charter services and door-to-door delivery for international shipments.

items.question: When should I choose air freight over sea freight?
items.answer: Air freight is ideal for time-sensitive shipments, high-value goods and urgent deliveries where speed is critical compared to sea freight.

items.question: Can DahNAY handle time-critical or same-day air shipments?
items.answer: DahNAY specialises in time-critical logistics and can arrange expedited or same-day air freight solutions based on cargo urgency.

items.question: What types of cargo can be transported via air freight?
items.answer: DahNAY handles a wide range of air cargo including perishable goods, pharmaceuticals, electronics, high-value shipments and urgent consignments.

items.question: How does DahNAY ensure cargo safety in air freight?
items.answer: DahNAY ensures cargo safety through secure packaging, compliance with airline regulations and continuous monitoring throughout transit.

items.question: How do you manage rising air freight rates and capacity constraints?
items.answer: DahNAY leverages strong airline partnerships, flexible routing options and strategic planning to manage capacity challenges and optimise costs.

items.question: What makes DahNAY's air freight approach different?
items.answer: DahNAY combines speed, flexibility and personalised service with global reach, ensuring efficient and reliable air freight solutions.

items.question: Does DahNAY provide on-demand air freight capacity?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY offers on-demand air freight capacity including charter solutions for urgent and high-priority shipments.

overview.title: Your cargo. Our commitment.
descriptions: From raw materials to finished products, global trade travels by sea. DahNAY enables that movement with discipline, foresight and control.

Across major international trade corridors, we manage high-volume ocean freight with structured planning, regulatory clarity and end-to-end visibility. Whether containerised cargo or complex project shipments, we move scale without losing precision.
Because what moves the world should never be left to chance.

expertise.content: From planning to delivery, our logistics experts manage every detail with precision. Your cargo moves safely, efficiently, and on time, every time.

certifications.title: Prepared to handle your freight with precision
descriptions: Our ocean freight services are backed by a comprehensive set of global certifications that ensure safety, transparency, and compliance at every stage.

We meet internationally recognised standards including ISO 9001 and ISO 14001, and adhere to HAZMAT and IMDG regulations for hazardous materials. We also support trade integrity through AEO certification, ISPM 15 compliance for wood packaging, and rigorous training and protocols in trade compliance and forklift operations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.content: Find answers to common questions about our sea freight services and how we can support your supply chain.

items.question: What sea freight services does DahNAY offer?
items.answer: DahNAY provides end-to-end sea freight services including Full Container Load (FCL), Less than Container Load (LCL), breakbulk shipping, project cargo handling and door-to-door ocean freight solutions for global trade.

items.question: Does DahNAY offer both FCL and LCL services?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY offers both FCL and LCL shipping services. FCL is ideal for large shipments requiring a dedicated container, while LCL is a cost-effective solution for smaller shipments sharing container space.

items.question: Can DahNAY handle temperature-sensitive cargo?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY handles temperature-controlled cargo through refrigerated containers (reefers), ensuring safe transport of perishable goods, pharmaceuticals and sensitive materials.

items.question: Do you manage customs clearance for sea shipments?
items.answer: DahNAY provides complete customs clearance services for sea freight, including documentation, compliance and coordination with customs authorities to ensure smooth import and export processes.

items.question: What ports and trade routes does DahNAY operate on?
items.answer: DahNAY operates across major global ports and trade routes connecting India, the UAE, the USA and key international markets, ensuring reliable ocean freight connectivity.

items.question: How does DahNAY manage sea freight disruptions or port congestion?
items.answer: DahNAY proactively manages disruptions through alternative routing, strong carrier partnerships and real-time shipment monitoring to minimise delays caused by port congestion or global supply chain issues.

items.question: How does DahNAY make sea freight less complex for shippers?
items.answer: DahNAY simplifies sea freight by offering end-to-end logistics management, transparent pricing, real-time tracking and dedicated support, reducing operational complexity for shippers.

items.question: What is the transit time for sea freight with DahNAY?
items.answer: Sea freight transit time depends on the shipping route, cargo type and port conditions. DahNAY provides accurate transit estimates and optimised routing to ensure timely delivery.

items.question: Does DahNAY provide tracking for sea freight shipments?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY offers real-time tracking and shipment visibility for sea freight, allowing customers to monitor cargo throughout the journey.

expertiseItems.title: Last-Mile & Reverse Integration
expertiseItems.description: Fulfilment is seamlessly connected with last-mile delivery and reverse logistics, ensuring smooth forward movement and efficient returns management within a unified ecosystem.

whyDahnay.title: Why DahNAY for Ecommerce Fulfilment Support?
whyDahnay.content: Ensure every shipment is precise, on time and fully optimised with DahNAY.

items.title: Global Fulfilment Presence
items.content: Owned warehousing in the USA and UAE enables faster, localised fulfilment.

items.title: Built for Scale
items.content: Proven capability to manage high-volume order cycles.

items.title: Accuracy & Speed
items.content: Streamlined processes ensure reliable and timely fulfilment.

items.title: End-to-End Integration
items.content: Connected across warehousing, transportation and reverse logistics.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.content: Find answers to common questions about our e-commerce fulfilment services and how we can support your supply chain.

items.question: What are the additional services DahNAY offers?
items.answer: DahNAY offers a wide range of logistics services including warehousing, distribution, customs clearance, cargo consolidation, project logistics and last mile delivery.

items.question: Do you provide warehousing and distribution services?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY offers integrated warehousing and distribution solutions, including inventory management, storage and order fulfilment across key global locations.

items.question: How does DahNAY ensure shipment visibility?
items.answer: DahNAY provides real-time tracking, proactive updates and digital visibility tools that allow clients to monitor shipments across the supply chain.

items.question: How do you customize logistics solutions?
items.answer: DahNAY designs tailored logistics solutions based on cargo type, industry requirements, timelines and cost considerations, ensuring efficient and scalable supply chain operations.
